name: better-go-to-file
description: A custom Go To File popup with tunable scoring.

scripts.check: bun run rulesync:check && bun run fmt:check && bun run lint && bun test && bun run compile && bun run knip

commands.title: Better Go To File: Inspect Icons
Better Go To File: Inspect Contributor Relationships

betterGoToFile.picker.showScores.markdownDescription: Shows each result's ranking score in the picker detail line.

betterGoToFile.picker.maxVisibleResults.markdownDescription: Maximum number of ranked results shown in the picker.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.pathTa.markdownDescription: How many trailing path segments to keep when shortening descriptions.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.collap.markdownDescription: More aggressive fallback tail length for shortened descriptions.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.queryC.markdownDescription: How many path segments around query matches stay visible in descriptions.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.maxRow.markdownDescription: Estimated row width budget used when truncating description text.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.labelP.markdownDescription: Reserved width budget between the filename label and description.

betterGoToFile.picker.description.minDes.markdownDescription: Minimum width budget kept for the description even for long file names.

betterGoToFile.gitignored.visibility.markdownDescription: Controls whether gitignored files appear in the picker. `auto` hides them unless the query looks specific.

betterGoToFile.gitignored.auto.minQueryL.markdownDescription: Minimum query length that makes `gitignored.visibility: auto` reveal ignored files.

betterGoToFile.gitignored.auto.minTokenC.markdownDescription: Minimum number of whitespace-separated query tokens that makes auto mode reveal ignored files.

betterGoToFile.gitignored.auto.revealOnP.markdownDescription: Makes auto mode reveal ignored files when the query includes path-like separators such as `.`, `/`, or `\`.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.fileGlob.markdownDescription: Glob used to discover candidate files for the in-memory workspace index.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.excludedDi.markdownDescription: Directory segment names excluded from the workspace file index.

betterGoToFile.workspaceIndex.maxFileCou.markdownDescription: Maximum number of files loaded into the workspace index.

betterGoToFile.frecency.halfLifeDays.markdownDescription: How quickly recorded opens decay over time.

betterGoToFile.frecency.flushDelayMs.markdownDescription: Delay before frecency changes are persisted to disk.

betterGoToFile.frecency.maxRecords.markdownDescription: Maximum number of frecency records persisted.

betterGoToFile.visits.implicitOpenWeight.markdownDescription: Weight assigned when a file is considered opened from dwell time in the active editor.

betterGoToFile.visits.explicitOpenWeight.markdownDescription: Weight assigned when a file is opened directly from the picker.

betterGoToFile.visits.editorDwellMs.markdownDescription: How long a file must stay active before it counts as an implicit open.

betterGoToFile.visits.duplicateVisitWind.markdownDescription: Window used to suppress duplicate visit recording for the same file.

betterGoToFile.git.refreshDebounceMs.markdownDescription: Debounce delay before Git state is refreshed after `.git` metadata changes.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.basenameE.markdownDescription: Base score for an exact basename match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.pathExact.markdownDescription: Base score for an exact relative-path match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.basenameP.markdownDescription: Base score for a basename prefix match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.pathPrefi.markdownDescription: Base score for a path prefix match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.basenameB.markdownDescription: Base score for a basename match that starts at a word or camel-case boundary.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.pathBound.markdownDescription: Base score for a path match that starts at a directory or word boundary.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.basenameS.markdownDescription: Base score for a plain basename substring match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.pathSubst.markdownDescription: Base score for a plain path substring match.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.basenameF.markdownDescription: Bonus added to fuzzy basename matches.

betterGoToFile.ranking.lexical.pathFuzzy.markdownDescription: Bonus added to fuzzy path matches.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.frecencyQ.markdownDescription: Multiplier applied to frecency when the picker has a query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.frecencyB.markdownDescription: Multiplier applied to frecency when the picker query is empty.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.trackedQu.markdownDescription: Boost for Git-tracked files when the picker has a query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.trackedBr.markdownDescription: Boost for Git-tracked files when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.ignoredQu.markdownDescription: Penalty for Git-ignored files when the picker has a query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.ignoredBr.markdownDescription: Penalty for Git-ignored files when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.untracked.markdownDescription: Penalty for untracked files when the picker has a query.
Penalty for untracked files when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.openQuery.markdownDescription: Boost for files that already have an open tab when the picker has a query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.openBrows.markdownDescription: Boost for files that already have an open tab when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.activeQue.markdownDescription: Boost for the active file when the picker has a query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.activeBro.markdownDescription: Boost for the active file when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.sameDirec.markdownDescription: Boost for files in the active file's directory when the picker has a query.
Boost for files in the active file's directory when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.ranking.context.sharedPre.markdownDescription: Per-segment boost for files that share at least two leading directory segments with the active file when the picker has a query.
Per-segment boost for files that share at least two leading directory segments with the active file when browsing with an empty query.
Boost for files that share exactly one leading directory segment with the active file when the picker has a query.
Boost for files that share exactly one leading directory segment with the active file when browsing with an empty query.

betterGoToFile.diagnostics.iconSampleCou.markdownDescription: How many files the icon inspection command samples.
